infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Chirp attaches one photo from your library to a post when you choose to.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Chirp can use the camera if you take a new photo for a post.

plugins.photosPermission: Chirp uses your photo library to attach one image to a post.
plugins.cameraPermission: Chirp uses the camera when you take a photo for a post.
